mapper.select: SELECT r.id as roomId, r.name, r.description, u.username as ownerName, r.current_members as currentMembers FROM room r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.owner_id = u.Id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM room_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_member (room_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, 0)
